title: arenaria grandiflora subsp. triflora
intro: Arenaria grandiflora subsp. triflora, also known as three-flower sandwort, is a perennial flowering plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria grandiflora subsp. triflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
